channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-03-15 07:39 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: BREAKING: Grok Imagine by@xaitakes 1st overall on Video Editing Arena, with an overall Elo of 1290. ...
item.description: BREAKING: Grok Imagine by@xaitakes 1st overall on Video Editing Arena, with an overall Elo of 1290. The team's debut video editing model establishes a new Pareto frontier for Preference vs. Speed with an average generation time of 1 min 5 sec. Congrats to the@xaiteam for this achievement!

item.title: @elonmusk: “I think the next company I do will have a long beneficial effect”—@elonmusk, 2001 Mission accomplis...
item.description: “I think the next company I do will have a long beneficial effect”—@elonmusk, 2001 Mission accomplished sir. Mission accomplished.

item.title: @elonmusk: This is the only way to save Britain. There is no other.
item.description: This is the only way to save Britain. There is no other.

item.description: A touch of romance for your day thanks to Grok Imagine

item.title: @elonmusk: Grok Imagine gets the vibe, iterates the world you imagine
item.description: Grok Imagine gets the vibe, iterates the world you imagine

item.title: @elonmusk: PBD Podcast on Elon Musk: “Whoever creates the most value for everybody else should end up with the ...
item.description: PBD Podcast on Elon Musk: “Whoever creates the most value for everybody else should end up with the most resources. Name somebody who’s done it better than him. Elon Musk for 30 years has averaged the creation of a multi-billion dollar company every 5 years. There’s nobody in the world who’s ever done that before. It is incredible, and it’s not like, ‘Oh, let me go do a roll-up of everybody else’s businesses’—it’s not financial engineering, it is from scratch: ‘we’re going to build a product to solve something at scale’.”

item.title: @elonmusk: The planet Saturn, captured during it's closest approach to Earth from the top of a parking garage i...
item.description: The planet Saturn, captured during it's closest approach to Earth from the top of a parking garage in the heart of Los Angeles. You can do plenty of astrophotography from a big city!

item.title: @elonmusk: Fired USAID Employee In Charge of Making Countries Gay Speaks Out
item.description: Fired USAID Employee In Charge of Making Countries Gay Speaks Out
